nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

variants.name: Adel

It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. en.lifeSummary: When Adèle de Thérouanne was born in 1033, in Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Godefroid DE THEROUANNE, was 28 and her mother, Walburge DE SAINTE-ALDEGONDE, was 18. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch. She died in 1074, in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle de Thérouanne est née en 1033, à Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Godefroid DE THEROUANNE, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Walburge DE SAINTE-ALDEGONDE, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch. Elle est décédée en 1074, à Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle de Thérouanne 1033 in Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godefroid DE THEROUANNE 28 und ihre Mutter Walburge DE SAINTE-ALDEGONDE 18. Sie hatte mit Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1074 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Thérouanne è nata il nel 1033 nel Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Godefroid DE THEROUANNE, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Walburge DE SAINTE-ALDEGONDE, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch. Morì nel 1074, nel Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 41 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle de Thérouanne(이)가 1033년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 스e루앤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godefroid DE THEROUANNE(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Walburge DE SAINTE-ALDEGONDE(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1074년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 버구스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Thérouanne nasceu em 1033, em Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Godefroid DE THEROUANNE, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Walburge DE SAINTE-ALDEGONDE, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch. Ela faleceu em 1074, em Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle de Thérouanne родилась в 1033 г. в местности тeроуанн, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Godefroid DE THEROUANNE было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Walburge DE SAINTE-ALDEGONDE, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch. Она умерла в 1074 г. в местности биргуесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle de Thérouanne nació en 1033, en Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Godefroid DE THEROUANNE, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Walburge DE SAINTE-ALDEGONDE, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch. Murió en 1074, en Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 41 años.
